title: update_contact_fully: unenforced (None,None) precondition bumps state spuriously
description: update_contact_fully is pub and documents 'callers must ensure at least one of blocked or display_name is Some', but does not enforce it. If called with (None, None), the function opens a transaction, checks existence, writes nothing, bumps the ChatContact state token, and returns Ok(true) — a spurious state bump with no field change. The current caller (Phase 2b in contact_set) cannot trigger this because Phase 2a guards ops.is_empty(), but any future caller can. Fix: add a debug_assert\! or return early with Err if both are None.
